title: Retainers & Orthodontics
short_description: Clear retainers, Hawley retainers and auxiliary orthodontic appliances.
description: Retainers and auxiliary orthodontic appliances are produced for post-treatment maintenance and routine clinical support. The category includes clear retainers, Hawley retainers and appliance work based on model or digital files.
